Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Patient registration and consult timeline status in the CuraQueue systems.

id.description: Unique auto-generated ID for the patient record.

token.description: Token number assigned to this patient in the queue sequence.

addedAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the patient was registered.

status.description: Current clinical queue status of this patient.

calledAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the patient was called into consultation.

completedAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the consult session was marked complete.

cancelledAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the patient appointment was cancelled.

isEmergency.description: Whether the patient is registered as an emergency priority.

QueueConfig.title: Queue Configuration
QueueConfig.description: Global queue tracking metadata and settings parameters.

averageConsultTime.description: Average anticipated consult duration per patient in minutes.

nextTokenNumber.description: The token index key for the subsequent registration.

/queueConfig/{configId}.description: Global operational state configuration parameters for the clinic.
